title: Software Engineer
job_description: We are looking for a software engineer to build and own backend services used by internal and customer-facing applications. You will design APIs, improve database performance, and support production systems. You will also mentor other engineers and help drive technical decisions across services. Candidates should have 7+ years of software engineering experience, including at least 4 years working on Python backend systems. Strong PostgreSQL schema design and query optimization skills are required. Experience building and maintaining REST APIs in production is important. Docker and CI/CD experience are preferred. This is a fully remote role working across distributed teams.
